creator: tomasz@kramkow.ski
text:
Created attachment 245841
[PATCH] Un-note initial invocation of `freebsd-install`

I reported this via the mailing list[0] and mentioned providing a patch.

This patch addresses the issue of the instructions for section 26.2.3 "Performing Minor and Major Version Upgrades" mentioning that `freebsd-install` must be ran for the first time to patch the kernel and kernel modules only in a note.

The note is now truly just a note and the rest of the document reads as expected.

[0]: https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-doc/2023-October/005096.html
